{{Quote|That's it for the entertainment folks! I'm looking for Sprool!|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Rebel Thief">{{StoryCite|series=Star Wars Kids (1997)|srtext=''Star Wars Kids'' (1997)|issue1=1|issue2=5|story=The Rebel Thief}}</ref>}}
'''Zio Snaffkin Cantina''' was a drinking and dining establishment on [[Dennogra/Legends|Dennogra]]. [[Sprool]] the Trader was known to frequent there. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] murdered an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] there.
